Items.Title: 构建类型实用程序 - 从 TypeScript 中的联合类型派生接口 | Building type utils - deriving interfaces from union types in TypeScript
Items.Description:
这篇文章解释了如何构建泛型类型工具来将接口的联合转换为接口。 这是我在上一篇文章中解释的特定解决方案的演变。

我们可以通过多种方式构建满足我们要求的泛型类型实用程序。 我们将选择一个花哨的，利用字符串文字和类型推断来提供良好的开发体验：

 type Action = | { type : ' reset ' } | { type : ' setValue ' ; payload : string } | { type : ' setSelection ' ; payload : [ number , number ] | null } | { type : ' trimWhitespace ' ; payload : ' leading ' | ' trailing ' | ' both ' }; type Dispatcher = ValuesAsCallbacks < UnionToKeyValue < Action , ' type:payload ' >> ; ▲ ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ type Dispatcher = { │ │ reset : () => void ; │ │ setValue : ( payload : string ) => void ; │ │ setSelection : ( payload : [ number , number ] | null ) => void ; │ │ trimWhitespace : ( payload : ' leading ' | ' trailing ' | ' both ' ) => void ; │ │ } │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

现在，让我们看看如何构建它🤔

两步过程

首先，让我们分解将一种类型转换为另一种类型的过程。 我们将在下一节中研究实现和更详细的解释。

首先，我们通过提供一个以冒号分隔的字符串文字来定义要用作键的属性和要用作值的属性，从而将联合转换为键值接口。 如果联合中的项目缺少该属性，我们将使用never类型来表示这个事实：

 type Action = | { type : ' reset ' } | { type : ' setValue ' ; payload : string } | { type : ' setSelection ' ; payload : [ number , number ] | null } | { type : ' trimWhitespace ' ; payload : ' leading ' | ' trailing ' | ' both ' }; type IntermediateResult = UnionToKeyValue < Action , ' type:payload ' > ; ▲ ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ type IntermediateResult = { │ │ reset : never ; │ │ setValue : string ; │ │ setSelection : [ number , number ] | null ; │ │ trimWhitespace : ' leading ' | ' trailing ' | ' both ' ; │ │ } │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

您是否已经看到它将如何变成带有回调的接口？

其次，我们将该键值转换为键回调接口，其中回调函数接受与前者中的值相同类型的参数：

 type IntermediateResult = { reset : never ; setValue : string ; setSelection : [ number , number ] | null ; trimWhitespace : ' leading ' | ' trailing ' | ' both ' ; } type Dispatcher = ValuesAsCallbacks < IntermediateResult > ; ▲ ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ type Dispatcher = { │ │ reset : () => void ; │ │ setValue : ( payload : string ) => void ; │ │ setSelection : ( payload : [ number , number ] | null ) => void ; │ │ trimWhitespace : ( payload : ' leading ' | ' trailing ' | ' both ' ) => void ; │ │ } │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

实现，以及一些解释

联合到键值

让我们看看如何实现第一个实用程序类型🕵️

 type UnionToKeyValue < T extends { [ key : string ]: any }, ① K extends string ② > = ...

感谢模板文字，我们可以从作为第二个参数提供的类型推断它们，只要它是字符串/字符串文字，并且它在内部某处包含分号。

给定作为第二个参数提供'type:payload' ，我们将推断 Key 是'type'而 Value 是'payload' 。 如果我们在第二个参数中没有找到分号，我们将无法进行模式匹配并返回never 。

如果它不属于，我们never返回。

? { [ A in T as A [ Key ]]: Value extends keyof A ? A [ Value ] : never } ⑤ ...

有了一个接口，我们就会看到keyof的使用。

最后，如果联合元素中不存在A[Key] ，我们不会将其包含在输出中。 我们对 Value 没有那么严格，如果A[Value]不存在，我们将其保持为never 。

最终代码

type UnionToKeyValue < T extends { [ key : string ]: any }, K extends string > = K extends ` ${ infer Key } : ${ infer Value } ` ? Key extends keyof T ? { [ A in T as A [ Key ]]: Value extends keyof A ? A [ Value ] : never } : never : never ;

这是大部分繁重的工作！

作为回调的值

将接口转换为接口应该会稍微容易一些，我们来看看。

 type ValuesAsCallbacks < T extends { [ key : string ]: any } > = ... ①

最终代码

type ValuesAsCallbacks < T extends { [ key : string ]: any } > = { [ K in keyof T ]: T [ K ] extends never ? () => void : ( payload : T [ K ]) => void ; };

就是这样，将接口的联合转换为带有回调的接口的难题中最后缺少的部分🎉你成功了！

最后的话

既然您已经探索了一种方法，我建议您尝试一下您可能想到的其他方法。

希望您喜欢这种类型的冒险！



原文:

This post explains how to build generic type utils to convert a union of interfaces into an interface. It is an evolution of a specific solution explained in my previous post.

There is a variety of ways in which we could build generic type utils that meet our requirements. We're going to pick a fancy one, leveraging string literals, and type inference to provide a nice development experience:

type Action = | { type: 'reset' } | { type: 'setValue'; payload: string } | { type: 'setSelection'; payload: [number, number] | null } | { type: 'trimWhitespace'; payload: 'leading'|'trailing'|'both' }; type Dispatcher = ValuesAsCallbacks<UnionToKeyValue<Action, 'type:payload'>>; ▲
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ type Dispatcher = { │
│ reset: () => void; │
│ setValue: (payload: string) => void; │
│ setSelection: (payload: [number, number] | null) => void; │
│ trimWhitespace: (payload: 'leading'|'trailing'|'both') => void; │
│ } │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Now, let's see how to build that 🤔

A two-step process

First, let's break down the process of turning one type into another. We'll look into the implementation and more detailed explanation in the next section.

1️⃣ Union to Key-Value

First, we're turning union into a key-value interface by providing a colon-delimited string literal defining the property to be used as a key and the property to be used as a value. In case the property is missing on the item from the union, we're going to represent this fact with never type:

type Action = | { type: 'reset' } | { type: 'setValue'; payload: string } | { type: 'setSelection'; payload: [number, number] | null } | { type: 'trimWhitespace'; payload: 'leading'|'trailing'|'both' }; type IntermediateResult = UnionToKeyValue<Action, 'type:payload'>; ▲
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ type IntermediateResult = { │
│ reset: never; │
│ setValue: string; │
│ setSelection: [number, number] | null; │
│ trimWhitespace: 'leading'|'trailing'|'both'; │
│ } │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Can you already see how that is going to turn into an interface with callbacks?

2️⃣ Values As Callbacks

Second, we're transforming that key-value into key-callback interface, where the callback function is accepting a parameter of the same type as the value in the former:

type IntermediateResult = { reset: never; setValue: string; setSelection: [number, number] | null; trimWhitespace: 'leading'|'trailing'|'both';
} type Dispatcher = ValuesAsCallbacks<IntermediateResult>; ▲
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ type Dispatcher = { │
│ reset: () => void; │
│ setValue: (payload: string) => void; │
│ setSelection: (payload: [number, number] | null) => void; │
│ trimWhitespace: (payload: 'leading'|'trailing'|'both') => void; │
│ } │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Implementation, and a bit of explanation

Union to Key-Value

Let's take a look at how to implement the first utility type 🕵️

type UnionToKeyValue< T extends { [key: string]: any }, ① K extends string ②
> = ...

(1) Our util accepts as a first parameter an interface, or a union of interfaces, indexed by keys being strings or string literals.

(2) It also requires a second parameter to be a string, or a string literal.

... = K extends `${infer Key}:${infer Value}` ③ ? Key extends keyof T ④ ? ... : never : never;

(3) Key and Value never appeared as type parameters of the util. Thanks to template literals, we can infer them from the type provided as the second parameter, so long as it's a string / string literal, and it contains a semicolon somewhere inside.

Given 'type:payload' provided as a second parameter, we're going to infer that Key is 'type' and Value is 'payload'. If we don't find a semicolon in the second parameter, we fail to pattern-match and we return never.

(4) Next, with the inferred Key, we double-check it belongs to the key set of the first parameter, T — an interface, or a union of interfaces. If it does not belong, we return never.

? { [A in T as A[Key]]: Value extends keyof A ? A[Value] : never } ⑤
...

(5) Now, we use mapped types to iterate through T, which implies T must be a union of types rather than a single interface. With an interface, we'd see the use of keyof there.

The use of as combined with indexed access A[Key] also gives a clue about elements of the union being interfaces and not primitive types such as undefined or null.

Finally, if A[Key] does not exist in the element of the union, we're not going to include it in the output. We're not that strict with Value, if A[Value] does not exist, we keep it as never.

Final code

type UnionToKeyValue< T extends { [key: string]: any }, K extends string
> = K extends `${infer Key}:${infer Value}` ? Key extends keyof T ? { [A in T as A[Key]]: Value extends keyof A ? A[Value] : never } : never : never;

That's most of the heavy work done!

Values as Callbacks

Transforming interfaces to interfaces should be slightly easier, let's take a look.

type ValuesAsCallbacks<T extends { [key: string]: any }> = ... ①

(1) This util accepts only one parameter, that must represent an interface with keys being strings or string literals and no constraints on the values

... = { [K in keyof T]: T[K] extends never ② ? () => void ③ : (payload: T[K]) => void; ④
};

(2) T is an interface, we iterate through all keys of the type, represented with K. Now, we check if the value, T[K], has type never.

(3) If we detect the value is of the type never, we return a type representing a callback not accepting any parameters.

(4) Otherwise, we return a type representing a single-parameter callback, where the parameter has the same type as the value in the original interface.

Final code

type ValuesAsCallbacks<T extends { [key: string]: any }> = { [K in keyof T]: T[K] extends never ? () => void : (payload: T[K]) => void;
};

That was it, the last missing piece in the puzzle of turning the union of interfaces into an interface with callbacks 🎉 You made it!

Final words

Now that you've explored one approach, I recommend trying other approaches that may come into your mind.

Hope you enjoyed this adventure with types!

Items.Description:
马肯德兰

发表于在 GitHub 上的存储库中创建一个.github/workflows目录。

  • 在.github/workflows目录中，您可以创建一个名为github-actions-kcddemo.yml的文件。
  • 要启动拉取请求，请滚动到页面底部并选择创建新分支。 单击提议新文件以创建拉取请求。
  • 当您将文件提交到分支时会发生推送事件。

    • 在 GitHub.com 上，转到存储库的主页。

    • 单击存储库名称下的操作。

    • 在左侧边栏中，您可以单击要查看的工作流程。

    • 单击要查看的运行的名称。

    • 您可以单击 Explore-GitHub-Actions 作业。

    • 日志显示如何处理这些步骤。 要查看其详细信息，请展开任何步骤。

    感谢您阅读我的文章直到最后。 我希望你今天学到了一些特别的东西。 如果您喜欢这篇文章，请分享给您的朋友，如果您有建议或想法与我分享，请在评论框中写下。



    原文:

    MakendranG

    Posted on May 29

    1. Create a .github/workflows directory in your repository on GitHub.
    2. In the .github/workflows directory, You can create a file named github-actions-kcddemo.yml.
    3. YAML contents is in the github-actions-demo.yml file.
    4. To start a pull request, scroll to the bottom of the page and select create a new branch. Click Propose new file to create a pull request.
    5. The push event occurs when you commit the file to a branch.

    • On GitHub.com, go to the main page of the repository.

    • Click Actions under your repository name.

    • In the left sidebar, you can click on the workflows you want to see.

    • Click on the name of the run you want to see.

    • You can click the Explore-GitHub-Actions job.

    • The log shows how the steps were processed. To view its details, expand any of the steps.

    Thanks for reading my article till end. I hope you learned something special today. If you enjoyed this article then please share to your friends and if you have suggestions or thoughts to share with me then please write in the comment box.
